steps.title: Identify the stated purpose
steps.content: The student wants to introduce a specific scientist and her field of study to a new audience. This requires naming the scientist, identifying her profession, and describing her area of study.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content:
B succeeds by naming Camille Jazmin Gaynus, identifying her as a marine biologist, and explaining she studies coral reefs (vital ecosystems supporting 25% of marine species).

  • A omits the scientist entirely
  • C discusses the field without naming the scientist
  • D names the scientist but fails to establish her profession or expertise
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
